# Architecture Diagrams — GAMA CALCULADORA

**Generated by:** @architect (Aria)
**Date:** 2026-02-27
**Purpose:** Detailed visual architecture reference

---

## 1. Provider Hierarchy (Nesting Order)

```
App.jsx
│
├─ ErrorBoundary (Class component)
│  │
│  └─ BrowserRouter
│     │
│     └─ ToastProvider
│        │
│        └─ AuthProvider (currentUser + profile)
│           │
│           └─ AccentColorProvider (watches profile.accent_color)
│              │
│              └─ PointsProvider (balance)
│                 │
│                 └─ ProposalProvider (localStorage sync)
│                    │
│                    └─ ValueReportProvider (localStorage sync)
│                       │
│                       └─ Routes + Suspense
│                          │
│                          ├─ /login, /signup, /welcome (public)
│                          │
│                          └─ ProtectedRoute
│                             │
│                             └─ Layout (header + nav + routes)
```

### Nesting Rationale

**Why this order?**

```
ErrorBoundary (outermost)
  → Catches all React errors below

BrowserRouter
  → Required for routing (must wrap Routes)

ToastProvider
  → Notifications needed everywhere (used by Auth, etc.)

AuthProvider
  → Sessions needed early
  → Profile loaded here (used by AccentColorProvider)

AccentColorProvider
  → Depends on: profile?.accent_color from AuthProvider
  → Must come after Auth, before others (color affects all UI)

PointsProvider
  → Balance affects UI (independent of color)

ProposalProvider
  → localStorage sync (independent)

ValueReportProvider
  → localStorage sync (independent)

Routes + Suspense
  → At bottom of hierarchy
```

---

## 2. Context Usage Map

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                    AccentColorContext                        │
│  Dependency:   profile?.accent_color (from AuthContext)      │
│  Consumers:    [All components via Tailwind CSS variables]  │
│                                                              │
│  State:        { accentColor }                              │
│  Effects:      setProperty('--primary-color')               │
│  Updates:      When profile.accent_color changes            │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                     AuthContext                              │
│  Data Source:   Supabase Auth + profiles table              │
│  Consumers:     Layout, UserProfile, AdminDashboard         │
│                 ProtectedRoute, AccentColorProvider         │
│                                                              │
│  State:                                                      │
│  ├─ currentUser { id, email, ... }  [from Supabase Auth]   │
│  ├─ profile { id, name, avatar, accent_color, role }       │
│  ├─ loading: boolean                                         │
│  └─ profileLoading: boolean                                 │
│                                                              │
│  Methods:                                                    │
│  ├─ login(email, password)                                  │
│  ├─ signup(email, password)                                 │
│  ├─ logout()                                                │
│  ├─ getProfile(userId)                                      │
│  └─ updateUserProfile(fields) → Supabase                   │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                    PointsProvider                            │
│  Data Source:   Supabase (points table or user field)       │
│  Consumers:     Layout (balance display), Pricing           │
│                                                              │
│  State:                                                      │
│  ├─ balance: number                                          │
│  └─ loading: boolean                                         │
│                                                              │
│  Methods:                                                    │
│  ├─ addPoints(amount) → Supabase                            │
│  ├─ consumePoints(amount) → Supabase                        │
│  └─ redeemCode(code) → Supabase                             │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                  ProposalContext                             │
│  Storage:       localStorage ("gama-active-proposal")       │
│  Consumers:     PricingCalculator, ProposalPreview          │
│                                                              │
│  State:                                                      │
│  └─ proposalData: { ...proposal fields }                    │
│                                                              │
│  Methods:                                                    │
│  └─ updateProposalData(data)                                │
│     [Auto-syncs to localStorage via useEffect]              │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                 ValueReportContext                           │
│  Storage:       localStorage                                │
│  Consumers:     ValueReportPreview, DiagnosticoCalculator   │
│                                                              │
│  State:         [Report generation state]                   │
│  Methods:       [Report persistence]                        │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                   ToastContext                               │
│  Storage:       In-memory (notifications)                   │
│  Consumers:     ALL (notification system)                   │
│                                                              │
│  State:                                                      │
│  └─ toasts: Array<{ id, message, type }>                    │
│                                                              │
│  Methods:                                                    │
│  ├─ addToast(message, type) → returns id                    │
│  └─ removeToast(id)                                         │
│                                                              │
│  Types:         'success' | 'error' | 'info' | 'warning'    │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

---

## 3. Color Theme Data Flow (Detailed)

### Previous Implementation (BROKEN - Before PHASE 3)

```
UserProfile.jsx
├─ Edit accent color input
└─ handleSaveProfile()
   ├─ localStorage.setItem('accent')                    ← Source 1
   ├─ document.documentElement.setProperty(--primary)  ← Action 1
   └─ window.dispatchEvent(accentColorChanged)         ← Notify

Layout.jsx
├─ Mount: getItem(localStorage) + setProperty()        ← Source 2
├─ useEffect watches profile?.accent_color
│  └─ setProperty()                                    ← Action 2 (duplicate!)
├─ useEffect watches localStorage
│  └─ setProperty()                                    ← Action 3 (duplicate!)
└─ addEventListener('accentColorChanged')
   └─ setProperty()                                    ← Action 4 (duplicate!)

AuthContext.jsx
└─ getProfile() fetches from Supabase
   └─ No color sync here                               ← Data source not connected

RACE CONDITIONS:
- localStorage may not be synced with DB
- Multiple setProperty calls competing
- Cross-tab sync unreliable
```

### Current Implementation (FIXED - After PHASE 3)

```
Supabase (profiles table)
│
└─ profile.accent_color = '#C4FF0D'     ← SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH
   │
   └─ AuthProvider fetches on login/startup
      │
      └─ setProfile(data)  [includes accent_color]
         │
         └─ AuthContext updates state
            │
            └─ AccentColorProvider watches dependency
               │
               └─ useEffect([profile?.accent_color])  ← Efficient trigger
                  │
                  ├─ const color = profile?.accent_color || '#C4FF0D'
                  │
                  ├─ document.documentElement.setProperty('--primary-color', color)
                  │  └─ CSS variable updates ONCE per color change
                  │
                  └─ document.documentElement.setProperty('--primary-color-rgb', `${r},${g},${b}`)
                     └─ Glow effects enabled
                        │
                        └─ Tailwind uses var(--primary-color) in classes
                           │
                           └─ UI updates automatically (no manual setProperty needed)

BENEFITS:
✅ Single source of truth (Supabase)
✅ Single setProperty call (efficient)
✅ Syncs across all tabs/devices
✅ No race conditions
✅ No localStorage inconsistencies
```

## 4. Component Tree (Key Routes)

```
Layout
│
├─ Header (desktop + mobile)
│  ├─ Logo + Brand
│  ├─ Navigation (5 links)
│  ├─ Balance Display (points)
│  └─ User Menu (avatar + dropdown)
│
├─ Left Sidebar (desktop)
│  └─ Navigation + Help Links (WhatsApp)
│
├─ Main Routes (lazy-loaded, within Suspense)
│  │
│  ├─ / (default)
│  │  └─ PricingCalculator
│  │     ├─ ProjectInfoForm
│  │     ├─ FeaturesCalculator
│  │     ├─ ComplexitySelector
│  │     ├─ CargoSalarioManager
│  │     └─ ImpactChart
│  │
│  ├─ /diagnostico-de-valor
│  │  └─ DiagnosticoDeValorCalculator
│  │     ├─ OperationProfileForm
│  │     ├─ ScenarioLossManager
│  │     └─ SolutionROISection
│  │
│  ├─ /proposal/preview
│  │  └─ ProposalPreview
│  │     └─ ReportGenerator (PDF)
│  │
│  ├─ /value-report/preview
│  │  └─ ValueReportPreview
│  │
│  ├─ /profile
│  │  └─ UserProfile
│  │     └─ [Profile form + avatar]
│  │
│  ├─ /settings
│  │  └─ UserSettings
│  │
│  ├─ /history
│  │  └─ HistoryWithSavedFilters
│  │     └─ AdvancedFilters
│  │
│  ├─ /admin (master/admin only)
│  │  └─ AdminDashboard
│  │
│  ├─ /admin/codes (master/admin only)
│  │  └─ PromoCodesManager
│  │
│  └─ /proposal/share, /proposal/whatsapp-confirm
│     └─ ShareProposal, WhatsappConfirmation
│
├─ BottomNav (mobile only)
│  └─ Quick navigation
│
└─ Fallback: LoadingSpinner (Suspense)
```

---

## 5. State Management Matrix

| Context | Scope | Persistence | Update Frequency | Consumer Count |
|---------|-------|-------------|------------------|----------------|
| **AuthContext** | Global | Supabase Auth | On login/logout | 20+ components |
| **AccentColorContext** | Global | Supabase DB | Rare (color change) | All via CSS |
| **PointsProvider** | Global | Supabase DB | Frequent (use calc) | 5-7 components |
| **ProposalContext** | Global | localStorage | Frequent (editing) | 3-4 components |
| **ValueReportContext** | Global | localStorage | Moderate | 2-3 components |
| **ToastContext** | Global | In-memory | Frequent (feedback) | 15+ components |

---

## 6. Routing Architecture

### Route Tree

```
BrowserRouter
│
├─ Public Routes (no auth required)
│  ├─ /login → LoginPage
│  ├─ /signup → SignUpPage
│  └─ /welcome → LandingPage
│
└─ Protected Routes (ProtectedRoute checks currentUser)
   │
   └─ /* (catch-all under Layout)
      │
      ├─ / → PricingCalculator
      ├─ /diagnostico-de-valor → DiagnosticoDeValorCalculator
      ├─ /proposal/preview → ProposalPreview
      ├─ /proposal/share → ShareProposal
      ├─ /proposal/whatsapp-confirm → WhatsappConfirmation
      ├─ /value-report/preview → ValueReportPreview
      ├─ /history → HistoryWithSavedFilters
      ├─ /history/filters → AdvancedFilters
      ├─ /profile → UserProfile
      ├─ /settings → UserSettings
      ├─ /pricing → PricingPlans
      ├─ /onboarding → SmartOnboarding (before main app)
      ├─ /admin → AdminDashboard (role: master|admin)
      └─ /admin/codes → PromoCodesManager (role: master|admin)
```

### Auth Guard Implementation

```jsx
<ProtectedRoute>
  const { currentUser, loading } = useAuth();

  if (loading) return <LoadingSpinner />;
  if (!currentUser) return <Navigate to="/welcome" />;

  return <Layout />;
</ProtectedRoute>
```

---

## 7. Component Dependency Graph (Critical Path)

```
AccentColorContext
│
└─ depends on → AuthContext (profile.accent_color)
                │
                └─ depends on → useAuth() hook
                   │
                   └─ depends on → Supabase Auth session

PricingCalculator
│
├─ depends on → ProposalContext
├─ depends on → PointsContext
├─ depends on → useAuth() (for profile)
└─ uses children:
   ├─ ProjectInfoForm
   ├─ FeaturesCalculator
   ├─ ComplexitySelector
   ├─ CargoSalarioManager
   └─ ImpactChart

Layout
│
├─ depends on → useAuth() (currentUser, profile)
├─ depends on → usePoints() (balance)
├─ uses children:
│  ├─ BottomNav
│  └─ Routes (all lazy-loaded)
└─ calls → navigate() [React Router]

AdminDashboard
│
└─ depends on → useAuth() (role check: master|admin)
   └─ depends on → Supabase RLS policies
```

---

## 8. Error Handling Flow

```
Try Block (Component Render)
│
├─ ERROR ─────────────────────────┐
│                                  │
│                    React Error   │
│                         │        │
│                    getDerivedStateFromError()
│                         │
│                    ErrorBoundary catches
│                         │
│                    Fallback UI:
│                    - Error message
│                    - Reload button
│                         │
│                    ✅ User sees error (not crash)
│
├─ TRY-CATCH (Async/Events)
│  │
│  ├─ Promise rejection
│  │  └─ .catch() or try-catch
│  │     └─ Handle gracefully
│  │        └─ addToast('Error message')
│  │
│  └─ Event handler error
│     └─ try-catch block
│        └─ Handle gracefully
│           └─ addToast('Error message')
│
└─ SUCCESS ──────────────────────┐
                                  │
                           Render normally
                                  │
                                  ✅
```

---

## 9. Performance Optimization Opportunities

```
Current (Good):
✅ Code splitting (16 lazy-loaded pages)
✅ Suspense boundaries (LoadingSpinner)
✅ Context isolation (color change doesn't re-render all)
✅ CSS-in-JS via Tailwind (no dynamic styles)

Opportunities:

1. useMemo for Expensive Calculations
   ├─ UserProfile stats (recalculates every render)
   ├─ Diagnostic calculations
   └─ Impact chart data transformations
   Impact: Low (not on hot path)

2. useCallback for Event Handlers
   ├─ Form submission handlers
   ├─ Navigation callbacks
   └─ Filter/sort handlers
   Impact: Minimal

3. Image Lazy Loading
   ├─ User avatars (Supabase storage)
   ├─ Report generation images
   └─ Dashboard charts
   Impact: Low

4. Reduce Bundle Size
   ├─ Current: React 19 + Router + Supabase + Recharts
   ├─ Tree-shake unused dependencies
   └─ Consider alternative charting library
   Impact: Medium
```

---

## 10. Security Data Flow

```
Authentication Path:
User Email/Password
  ↓
LoginPage.jsx
  ↓
AuthContext.login() calls supabase.auth.signInWithPassword()
  ↓
Supabase Auth (bcrypt + JWT)
  ↓
Session token stored in:
  - localStorage (by Supabase JS SDK)
  - currentUser state (in-memory)
  ↓
API requests include JWT in Authorization header
  ↓
Supabase validates token + checks RLS policies
  ↓
DB returns data only if RLS allows

RLS Policies:
- profiles: Users can only see/edit their own profile
- proposals: Users can only see/edit own proposals
- calculations: Users can only see own calculations

Admin Access:
- role = 'master' or 'admin'
- AdminDashboard checks role
- Supabase RLS also checks role
- Double validation (front-end + back-end)
```

---

## 11. Data Persistence Strategy

```
Real-time Data (Supabase):
├─ User profiles
├─ Proposals (created/modified)
├─ Calculations (history)
├─ Points (balance)
└─ Admin settings
   └─ Syncs via AuthContext (fetched on login)
   └─ Updates via updateUserProfile()

Temporary Data (localStorage):
├─ Active proposal being edited ("gama-active-proposal")
├─ Active diagnostic value report
└─ User preferences (onboarding status)
   └─ Survives page refresh
   └─ Cleared on logout (manually or auto)

Session Data (In-memory):
├─ currentUser (Supabase Auth)
├─ accentColor (AccentColorContext)
├─ balance (PointsProvider)
└─ toasts (ToastContext)
   └─ Lost on page reload
   └─ Cleared on logout
```

---

## 12. Scaling Readiness Checklist

```
✅ Component Organization (33 components well-structured)
✅ Context Hierarchy (6 contexts, clean nesting)
✅ Lazy Loading (16 pages split, fast initial load)
✅ Error Handling (ErrorBoundary + Suspense)
✅ Database (Supabase with RLS)
✅ Build Tool (Vite, optimized)

🟡 Type Safety (JavaScript, no TypeScript)
🟡 Testing (no unit tests yet)
🟡 Performance (some optimization opportunities)

Ready to scale to:
- 50+ components ✅
- 20+ routes ✅
- 10+ contexts ✅
- 10M+ users (with DB optimization) ✅
```
